name: Infrastructure Dashboard
description: Kubernetes infrastructure monitoring with containers, pods, and nodes

nrql.query: SELECT average(cpuUsage) FROM ContainerMetric TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT average(memoryUsage) FROM ContainerMetric TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM PodRestartEvent TIMESERIES 5 minutes SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT average(cpuUsage) FROM NodeMetric FACET nodeName SINCE 15 minutes ago
SELECT average(memoryUsage) FROM NodeMetric FACET nodeName SINCE 15 minutes ago
SELECT count(*) FROM ContainerMetric FACET namespace SINCE 15 minutes ago
SELECT average(cpuUsage) FROM ContainerMetric FACET namespace, podName TIMESERIES 15 minutes SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT sum(networkIo) FROM ContainerMetric FACET namespace, direction SINCE 15 minutes ago
SELECT namespace, podName, containerName, average(cpuUsage), max(cpuUsage) FROM ContainerMetric WHERE cpuUsage > 80 SINCE 30 minutes ago ORDER BY average(cpuUsage) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT namespace, podName, containerName, average(memoryUsage), max(memoryUsage) FROM ContainerMetric WHERE memoryUsage > 80 SINCE 30 minutes ago ORDER BY average(memoryUsage) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT count(*) FROM PodRestartEvent FACET namespace SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT average(diskUsage) FROM NodeMetric FACET nodeName SINCE 15 minutes ago
SELECT count(*) FROM ContainerMetric WHERE cpuUsage < 90 AND memoryUsage < 90 SINCE 5 minutes ago
SELECT count(*) FROM PodRestartEvent WHERE restartCount > 0 SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM NodeMetric FACET nodeName SINCE 15 minutes ago
SELECT count(*) FROM ContainerMetric FACET containerName SINCE 15 minutes ago
